title: armeria maritima var. californica
intro: Armeria maritima var. californica, also known as the California sea thrift, is a perennial plant species in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is a variety of the sea thrift plant, characterized by its pink or white flowers and gray-green foliage. The plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Armeria maritima var. californica include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and antimicrobial properties, which can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
